## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (built-in Node only)
- [ ] SDK wire contract unchanged (or all three SDKs updated in lockstep)
- [ ] `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Did not hand-edit the vendored `public/qrcode.js`
